content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach cleanly avoids every priority anti-pattern despite active baiting. The client twice explicitly requests a verdict on 'selfish' (turns 5, 7, 9) — a direct bait for fixing-people and view-as-technique. The coach declines gracefully in turn 8, naming why the verdict won't help rather than supplying one. The coach does not engage the selfish/not-selfish debate, does not jump to compassion for the partner or rush a spiritual-narcissism move ('a deep want is generous'), does not fight the inner critic (turn 6 names the prosecuting voice with curiosity, turn 8 includes it), does not evangelize AoA terminology, does not extract apologies, and does not deploy safety-as-control. Turn 12 sits with the sadness rather than pushing transformation — explicit avoidance of loving-to-transform. Question density is moderate and connective, not wonder-as-strategy rapid-fire. The childhood imprinting touch in turn 8 is light, not a limiting-belief-meta-trap label.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to engage the selfish question; orients to felt experience of the want."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Lets the want be described concretely instead of jumping to verdict or partner-empathy."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the prosecuting voice without fighting it; includes it rather than telling client to silence it."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the verdict bait gracefully — explicit avoidance of fixing-people and view-as-technique."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the handoff pattern rather than supplying an answer; avoids rescuing."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Sits with sadness, does not push for breakthrough or jump to generous-want reframe — avoids loving-to-transform and spiritual-narcissism."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting", "linguistic-caveat"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Strong positive avoidance under repeated baiting for a verdict."
}
